title: OmniCAD Branding Config
description: Customisable CLI branding shown on startup and in the REPL. Edit config/branding.json — no rebuild required.

name.description: Internal CLI identifier (informational; actual shell binary name is fixed by pyproject.toml [project.scripts]).

display_name.description: Human-facing application name shown inside the banner panel, e.g. 'OmniCAD'.

prompt.description: REPL prompt root string. A trailing '> ' is automatically appended.

version.description: Version string shown in the banner. Use the literal '@auto' to derive from the installed pipeline-engine package metadata.

description.description: Short tagline shown beneath the display_name and version.

logo.description: Multi-line ASCII-art logo rendered at the top of the banner. Use '\n' for line breaks. Empty string disables the logo block.

logo_style.description: Rich color/style applied to the logo glyphs (e.g. 'light_steel_blue1', 'bold cyan'). See https://rich.readthedocs.io/en/latest/style.html.

border_style.description: Rich style applied to the surrounding Panel border (e.g. 'grey50', 'grey42', 'sky_blue3').

tagline_style.description: Rich style applied to the display_name, version, and description lines.

box_style.description: Which Rich box constant to use for the Panel outline. ROUNDED (default) uses ╭─╮ / │ / ╰─╯ corners.
